releaseCommit: the commit carrying this manifest (tagged v0.2.0; see git)
releaseScope: runtime-first live preview and gated single-write persistence for the v0.55.2 data/model, zero-drift audited against Hyprland 0.55.4
checksumNote: authoritative checksums live in dist/v0.2.0/SHA256SUMS and on the GitHub release, not in this committed manifest: the source archive is built from the commit containing the manifest, so embedded checksums could never match themselves
knownLimitations: 18 touch-family rows and 3 secondary-device rows unproven pending hardware (disarmed, not broken)
monitor/bind/gesture/device/permission families blocked for editing with honest reasons
animation style field not editable (no trusted valid-value evidence); preserved on save
disabled animation records reset their speed/bezier readback (live-proof finding)
scalar model projects flat section:key = value syntax only
data model tracks v0.55.2; 0.55.4 audited at zero drift
